description: authorCorrection slot carries an adapter-originated parse issue that should be passed through without blocking valid settlement parsing

files.description: Same sanitized settlement rows as the valid single-sheet fixture.
Adapter failed to parse optional correction input, but valid settlement rows should still be emitted.

notes: This fixture locks passthrough behavior for optional-slot adapter issues.
The optional authorCorrection adapter issue must not block settlement parsing by itself.
The adapter issue should appear alongside any parser-generated issues; this fixture expects only passthrough.
